functions.name: addDatabase
functions.description: Adds a PostgreSQL database to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: databaseName
parameters.description: The name of the database. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: addPostgres
functions.description: Adds a PostgreSQL resource to the application model. A container is used for local development.
functions.signature: addPostgres(name: string, userName?: ParameterResource, password?: ParameterResource, port?: number): PostgresServerResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the user name for the PostgreSQL resource. If `null` a default value will be used.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the administrator password for the PostgreSQL resource. If `null` a random password will be generated.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port used when launching the container. If null a random port will be assigned.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Postgres database.

functions.name: databaseName
functions.description: Gets the database name.

functions.name: jdbcConnectionString
functions.description: Gets the JDBC connection string for the PostgreSQL database.
functions.remarks:
Format: `jdbc:postgresql://{host}:{port}/{database}`.
User and password credentials are not included in the JDBC connection string. Use the `GetConnectionProperties` method to access the `Username` and `Password` properties.

functions.name: parent
functions.description: Gets the parent PostgresSQL container resource.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the PostgreSQL database.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the PostgreSQL server.

functions.name: databases
functions.description: A dictionary where the key is the resource name and the value is the database name.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this service.

functions.name: jdbcConnectionString
functions.description: Gets the JDBC connection string for the PostgreSQL server.
functions.remarks:
Format: `jdbc:postgresql://{host}:{port}`.
User and password credentials are not included in the JDBC connection string. Use the `Username` and `Password` connection properties to access credentials.

functions.name: passwordParameter
functions.description: Gets or sets the parameter that contains the PostgreSQL server password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the endpoint reference expression that identifies the port for this endpoint.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the PostgreSQL server.

functions.name: setPasswordParameter
functions.description: Gets or sets the parameter that contains the PostgreSQL server password.

functions.name: setUserNameParameter
functions.description: Gets or sets the parameter that contains the PostgreSQL server user name.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the PostgreSQL server.

functions.name: userNameParameter
functions.description: Gets or sets the parameter that contains the PostgreSQL server user name.

functions.name: userNameReference
functions.description: Gets a reference to the user name for the PostgreSQL server.
functions.remarks: Returns the user name parameter if specified, otherwise returns the default user name "postgres".

functions.name: withCreationScript
functions.description: Defines the SQL script used to create the database.
functions.remarks:
The script can only contain SQL statements applying to the default database like CREATE DATABASE. Custom statements like table creation
and data insertion are not supported since they require a distinct connection to the newly created database.
Default script is
```
CREATE DATABASE "<QUOTED_DATABASE_NAME>"
```

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: The SQL script used to create the database.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a PostgreSQL container resource.
functions.remarks:
The data directory location varies by PostgreSQL version:
- PostgreSQL 17 and earlier: `/var/lib/postgresql/data`
- PostgreSQL 18 and later: `/var/lib/postgresql`
This method automatically selects the correct path based on the configured container image tag.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a PostgreSQL container resource.
functions.remarks:
The data directory location varies by PostgreSQL version:
- PostgreSQL 17 and earlier: `/var/lib/postgresql/data`
- PostgreSQL 18 and later: `/var/lib/postgresql`
This method automatically selects the correct path based on the configured container image tag.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the PGAdmin resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the pgweb resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the PostgreSQL resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withInitFiles
functions.description: Copies init files to a PostgreSQL container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory or files on the host to copy into the container.

functions.name: withPassword
functions.description: Configures the password that the PostgreSQL resource is used.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the password for the PostgreSQL resource.

functions.name: withPgAdmin
functions.description: Adds a pgAdmin 4 administration and development platform for PostgreSQL to the application model.
functions.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: withPgAdmin(configureContainer?: (obj: PgAdminContainerResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): PostgresServerResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Callback to configure PgAdmin container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container (Optional).

functions.name: withPgWeb
functions.description: Adds an administration and development platform for PostgreSQL to the application model using pgweb.
functions.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: withPgWeb(configureContainer?: (obj: PgWebContainerResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): PostgresServerResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Configuration callback for pgweb container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container (Optional).

functions.name: withPostgresMcp
functions.description: Adds a Postgres MCP server container and configures it to connect to the database represented by `builder`.
functions.remarks:
The Postgres MCP server is configured to use SSE transport and will expose an HTTP endpoint.
This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: withPostgresMcp(configureContainer?: (obj: PostgresMcpContainerResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): PostgresDatabaseResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Configuration callback for the Postgres MCP container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name of the container (optional).

functions.name: withUserName
functions.description: Configures the user name that the PostgreSQL resource is used.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the user name for the PostgreSQL resource.
